0.title: Frustrating Transactions
0.query:
timeseries count = avg(netscaler.service.frustratingttlbtransactions.count), by: { `dt.entity.python:com_dynatrace_extension_netscaler_service` }
| fieldsAdd name=entityAttr(`dt.entity.python:com_dynatrace_extension_netscaler_service`, "entity.name")
| sort arrayAvg(count) desc
| limit 20

1.title: Surge Queue Requests
1.query:
timeseries count = avg(netscaler.service.surgecount.count), by: { `dt.entity.python:com_dynatrace_extension_netscaler_service` }
| fieldsAdd name=entityAttr(`dt.entity.python:com_dynatrace_extension_netscaler_service`, "entity.name")
| sort arrayAvg(count) desc
| limit 20

| sort arrayAvg(count) desc
| limit 20

| sort arrayAvg(count) desc
| limit 20

| fieldsAdd name=entityAttr(`dt.entity.python:com_dynatrace_extension_netscaler_vpnvserver`, "entity.name")
| sort arrayAvg(series.state) desc
| limit 20

67.title: Interface UP percentage
67.query:
timeseries { series.intfstate = sum(netscaler.Interface.intfstate, rollup: total, default: 0, filter: { intfstate == "UP" }), series.intfstate.0 = sum(netscaler.Interface.intfstate, rollup: total, default: 1) }, by: { `dt.entity.python:com_dynatrace_extension_netscaler`, `dt.entity.python:com_dynatrace_extension_netscaler_interface` }, union: true
| fieldsAdd up_percent = 100 * series.intfstate[] / series.intfstate.0[]
| summarize { up_percent = avg(up_percent[] ) }, by: { `dt.entity.python:com_dynatrace_extension_netscaler_interface`, timeframe, interval }
| fieldsAdd name=entityAttr(`dt.entity.python:com_dynatrace_extension_netscaler_interface`, "entity.name")
| sort arrayAvg(up_percent) desc
| limit 20

68.title: lbvserver UP percentage
68.query:
timeseries { series.state = sum(netscaler.lbvserver.state, rollup: total, default: 0, filter: { state == "UP" }), series.state.0 = sum(netscaler.lbvserver.state, rollup: total, default: 1) }, by: { `dt.entity.python:com_dynatrace_extension_netscaler`, `dt.entity.python:com_dynatrace_extension_netscaler_lbvserver` }, union: true
| fieldsAdd up_percent = 100 * series.state[] / series.state.0[]
| summarize { up_percent = avg(up_percent[] ) }, by: { `dt.entity.python:com_dynatrace_extension_netscaler_lbvserver`, timeframe, interval }
| fieldsAdd name=entityAttr(`dt.entity.python:com_dynatrace_extension_netscaler_lbvserver`, "entity.name")
| sort arrayAvg(up_percent) desc
| limit 20

69.title: Service UP percentage
69.query:
timeseries { series.state = sum(netscaler.service.state, rollup: total, default: 0, filter: { state == "UP" }), series.state.0 = sum(netscaler.service.state, rollup: total, default: 1) }, by: { `dt.entity.python:com_dynatrace_extension_netscaler`, `dt.entity.python:com_dynatrace_extension_netscaler_service` }, union: true
| fieldsAdd up_percent = 100 * series.state[] / series.state.0[]
| summarize { up_percent = avg(up_percent[] ) }, by: { `dt.entity.python:com_dynatrace_extension_netscaler_service`, timeframe, interval }
| fieldsAdd name=entityAttr(`dt.entity.python:com_dynatrace_extension_netscaler_service`, "entity.name")
| sort arrayAvg(up_percent) desc
| limit 20

70.title: servicegroup ENABLED percentage
70.query:
timeseries { series.state = sum(netscaler.servicegroup.state, rollup: total, default: 0, filter: { state == "ENABLED" }), series.state.0 = sum(netscaler.servicegroup.state, rollup: total, default: 1) }, by: { `dt.entity.python:com_dynatrace_extension_netscaler`, `dt.entity.python:com_dynatrace_extension_netscaler_servicegroup` }, union: true
| fieldsAdd up_percent = 100 * series.state[] / series.state.0[]
| summarize { up_percent = avg(up_percent[] ) }, by: { `dt.entity.python:com_dynatrace_extension_netscaler_servicegroup`, timeframe, interval }
| fieldsAdd name=entityAttr(`dt.entity.python:com_dynatrace_extension_netscaler_servicegroup`, "entity.name")
| sort arrayAvg(up_percent) desc
| limit 20
